assertions.description: fetch is the surface DBSC operates through — the server signals session credential binding via response headers.
crypto.subtle is exposed — DBSC relies on the user agent generating a device-bound key pair via the WebCrypto primitives.
DBSC is a secure-context-only feature; isSecureContext must be observable to script.
CookieStore is exposed — DBSC's bound sessions interact with the cookie surface used by the document.
FeaturePolicy / Permissions Policy mechanism (document.featurePolicy or document.permissionsPolicy) underpins DBSC's gating.
